sutta: monks holding fast to 7 things among may destroy the asavas and enter and abide in the asava free emancipation by mind what 7 here in mounts among is full of faith virtuous learned lives secluded has sustained energy is mindful is wise verily monks holding fast to these 7 things among may destroy the asavas and enter and abide in the asava free emancipation by mind that's the end of the suta
commentary: here are mentioned certain qualities and certain states which are very important for a manga to attain destruction of the asaphas the first 1 is having faith santa the second 1 is virtuous that means he has moral conduct keeps the precepts third 1 is learned that means he's knowledgeable on the sutas and the vinaya the fourth 1 he lives secluded the seclusion and seclusion is very important for a monk who wants to strive to end suffering and then after that he has a sustained energy [Music] or energetic effort and then he's mindful practices sati and finally his yes wisdom and next to
